meta.title: What's really going on with the drones over New Jersey?
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 50% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

According to countless eyewitness reports, New Jersey has been the site of an unusual rash of drone activity in recent weeks, with a variety of drones ranging in size from small quadcopters to platforms so big they could potentially have crew onboard, zooming through the skies of New Jersey and surrounding states with no apparent answers as to where they come from, who’s operating them, or what risk — if any — they might pose to national security. 

But as interesting as this mystery is, it’s been overshadowed in a great deal of online discourse by another phenomenon that, like drones, has been an ever-growing part of our modern world since the onset of the digital revolution: the internet hyperbole machine. 

Let’s talk about how to cut through all the static and try to figure out what’s really going on.
